title: Update AGENTS.md to reflect reality
description: AGENTS.md has drift: (1) says 'Three entry points' but 7+ exist; (2) says 'path aliases @/*' but only 1 file uses them; (3) says 'NO .js extensions' with 220 violations; (4) says 'config validates with Valibot' but uses Zod; (5) section on 'Three entry points' is wrong. Update AGENTS.md to match the post-cleanup state. Note: depends on tasks 9, 22 being done first.
validation: Read AGENTS.md, confirm: 3 entry points (index.ts, stdio-server.ts, http-server.ts), Zod (not Valibot), @/ alias encouraged but not enforced, .js extensions not present (after #9 removes the bad files).
